'''dhopashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbalic|cabbalic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbalic|cabbalic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhopashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhopashithi|dhopashithi]] || [[word:dhopashiji|dhopashiji]] || [[word:dhopashishi|dhopashishi]] || [[word:dhopashiki|dhopashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhopashuthuthu|dhopashuthuthu]] || [[word:dhopashujuju|dhopashujuju]] || [[word:dhopashushushu|dhopashushushu]] || [[word:dhopashukuku|dhopashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhopashuthu|dhopashuthu]] || [[word:dhopashuju|dhopashuju]] || [[word:dhopashushu|dhopashushu]] || [[word:dhopashuku|dhopashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhopashufthuf|dhopashufthuf]] || [[word:dhopashufjuf|dhopashufjuf]] || [[word:dhopashufshuf|dhopashufshuf]] || [[word:dhopashufkuf|dhopashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhopashethe|dhopashethe]] || [[word:dhopasheje|dhopasheje]] || [[word:dhopasheshe|dhopasheshe]] || [[word:dhopasheke|dhopasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhopashothotho|dhopashothotho]] || [[word:dhopashojojo|dhopashojojo]] || [[word:dhopashoshosho|dhopashoshosho]] || [[word:dhopashokoko|dhopashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhopashotho|dhopashotho]] || [[word:dhopashojo|dhopashojo]] || [[word:dhopashosho|dhopashosho]] || [[word:dhopashoko|dhopashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhopashofthof|dhopashofthof]] || [[word:dhopashofjof|dhopashofjof]] || [[word:dhopashofshof|dhopashofshof]] || [[word:dhopashofkof|dhopashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfthĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfjĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfshĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfkĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfthĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfjĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfshĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfkĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfthĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfjĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfshĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhopashĂŻfkĂŻf|dhopashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhopashĂŠthĂŠ|dhopashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhopashĂŠjĂŠ|dhopashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhopashĂŠshĂŠ|dhopashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhopashĂŠkĂŠ|dhopashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhopashathatha|dhopashathatha]] || [[word:dhopashajaja|dhopashajaja]] || [[word:dhopashashasha|dhopashashasha]] || [[word:dhopashakaka|dhopashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhopashatha|dhopashatha]] || [[word:dhopashaja|dhopashaja]] || [[word:dhopashasha|dhopashasha]] || [[word:dhopashaka|dhopashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhopashafthaf|dhopashafthaf]] || [[word:dhopashafjaf|dhopashafjaf]] || [[word:dhopashafshaf|dhopashafshaf]] || [[word:dhopashafkaf|dhopashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhopashasha|dhopashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhopashĂ«sha|dhopashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhopashrosha|dhopashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhopashmusha|dhopashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhopashyasha|dhopashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhopashnkshĂ«sha|godhopashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhopashnkrosha|godhopashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhopashnkmusha|godhopashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhopashnkyasha|godhopashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhopapashasha|dhopapashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhopapashĂ«sha|dhopapashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhopapashrosha|dhopapashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhopapashmusha|dhopapashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhopapashyasha|dhopapashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhopapashnkshĂ«sha|godhopapashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhopapashnkrosha|godhopapashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhopapashnkmusha|godhopapashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhopapashnkyasha|godhopapashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhepĂŠshasha|dhepĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhepĂŠshĂ«sha|dhepĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhepĂŠshrosha|dhepĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhepĂŠshmusha|dhepĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhepĂŠshyasha|dhepĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhepĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|godhepĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhepĂŠshnkrosha|godhepĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhepĂŠshnkmusha|godhepĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhepĂŠshnkyasha|godhepĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhopfashasha|dhopfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhopfashĂ«sha|dhopfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhopfashrosha|dhopfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhopfashmusha|dhopfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhopfashyasha|dhopfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhopfashnkshĂ«sha|godhopfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhopfashnkrosha|godhopfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhopfashnkmusha|godhopfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhopfashnkyasha|godhopfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
